evidence.snippet:
*   Mobile position and orientation solutions for sensors and vehicles
*   Industry-leading GNSS-aided inertial technology
*   Direct Georeferencing solutions for imaging devices
*   Sensor fusion and complex systems integrations
*   Real-time and post-mission mobile mapping software and processes
*   Deep understanding of Inertial technologies & manufacturing

#### Trimble APX UAV
A high-performance GNSS-inertial (GNSS + INS) OEM solution for UAVs, offering enhanced mapping efficiency and accuracy in a compact and lightweight design

#### Trimble AP+ Air
The Trimble AP+ Air GNSS-inertial (GNSS + INS) system is a compact and versatile OEM solution designed for robust airborne positioning and direct georeferencing, seamlessly compatible with both UAVs and crewed platforms

items.notes: Core business: GNSS-aided inertial positioning systems (GNSS+INS OEM modules) for UAVs, aircraft, marine vessels, and land vehicles.

tagline: Manufactures GNSS-inertial navigation and positioning subsystems (POS family, APX/AP+ OEM boards) for airborne, marine, and land platforms, including direct-georeferencing solutions for UAV mapping and autonomy development. NDAA certification status and specific US defense contracts not confirmed in public record; Blue UAS listing not verified. Production-ready across multiple form factors.
